name: omega
description: Omega — a single-system local AI operating system. Inference engine, agent runtime, memory, tools, API, and UI in one unified app.

scripts.build: npm run -w packages/sdk build && npm run build:ui
scripts.build:win: npm run -w packages/sdk build && npm run build:win-native
scripts.build:mac: npm run -w packages/sdk build && npm run build:ui && bash scripts/build-macos-native.sh
scripts.build:linux: npm run -w packages/sdk build && npm run build:ui && bash scripts/build-linux-native.sh
scripts.prebuild:mac: node scripts/sync-llama-cpp.mjs && npm run fetch:infer && node scripts/build-engine.mjs
scripts.build:ui: npm run -w packages/sdk build && npm run -w @omega/desktop build:ui
scripts.build:shell: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:ui && node scripts/build-desktop-shell.mjs && node scripts/package-native-shell.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w packages/sdk typecheck && npm run -w apps/desktop typecheck
